---
title: "Jian Wu"
image: assets/avatar/jian-wu.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: lanayawj@buaa.edu.cn
      href: mailto:lanayawj@buaa.edu.cn
    - icon: github
      text: JianWu
      href: https://github.com/jianwu-buaa
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3863-8814
#    - icon: 📝
#      text: CV
#      href: CV.pdf  
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I am a researcher at Beihang University (BUAA), working on virtual reality (VR), mixed reality (MR), and human-computer interaction (HCI). My recent work focuses on efficient interaction, foveated rendering, scene-aware methods, and AI for immersive environments.

## Research Interests

- VR/AR interaction techniques and user perception
- Foveated rendering and neural scene representation
- Scene-aware layout, navigation, and object arrangement in immersive environments
- Haptic retargeting and multimodal interaction in VR

## Highlights

- International Journal of Human-Computer Studies, 2026
- IEEE TVCG / IEEE VR / IEEE ISMAR publications
- VR 2025 Best Paper Honorable Mention (Fov-GS)
- ISMAR 2024 Best Student Journal Paper (VPRF)

## Education

2018 – 2024: Ph.D. in Computer Application Technology
School of Computer Science and Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing, China

2015 – 2018: M.S. in Mechanical Engineering (Major in Mechanical Design)
School of Mechanical Engineering and Automation, Beihang University, Beijing, China

2011 – 2015: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering and Automation
School of Mechanical Engineering and Automation, Beihang University, Beijing, China

## Professional Experience

2024 – Present: Assistant Researcher
School of Computer Science and Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing, China

:::
